caption: A young man with glasses and medium-length brown hair stands in a neutral-colored indoor setting, likely an office or classroom, in front of a light gray wall. He is wearing a black t-shirt featuring a graphic of a face and the text "Kr th," as well as a blue lanyard with an identification badge. In the first scene, he stands with his left hand on his hip and his right hand gesturing near his chest. As the sequence progresses, he shifts his posture, bringing both hands together in front of his waist. He remains the sole person visible throughout the clip, facing forward and speaking. A black office chair is partially visible in the bottom left foreground across all frames. The background remains static, and the man's movements are subtle, centered on his hand gestures and slight shifts in his stance.
